name: Carol Potter's Noodles with Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Smooth peanut butter or Tahini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring water to a boil and add the noodles. Cook until tender (follow package directions).
2. Drain the noodles well and rinse with cold water. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix peanut butter or tahini with brewed tea.
4. Add soy sauce, chili oil, sesame oil, vinegar, sugar, and minced garlic to the peanut butter mixture.
5. Pour the mixture over the cooled noodles and toss until evenly blended.
6. Sprinkle with chopped scallions.
7. Serve at room temperature as an appetizer or side dish.
